mapper.select: SELECT id, `category-id`, `dish-name`, image, price, description, sales, stock, status, discount, `create-time` FROM t_dish ORDER BY `create-time` DESC
SELECT id, `category-id`, `dish-name`, image, price, description, sales, stock, status, discount, `create-time` FROM t_dish WHERE `category-id` = #{categoryId} ORDER BY `create-time` DESC
SELECT id, `category-id`, `dish-name`, image, price, description, sales, stock, status, discount, `create-time` FROM t_dish WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY `create-time` DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_dish (`category-id`, `dish-name`, image, price, description, sales, stock, status, discount, `create-time`) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{dishName}, #{image}, #{price}, #{description}, #{sales}, #{stock}, #{status}, #{discount}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_dish SET `category-id` = #{categoryId}, `dish-name` = #{dishName}, image = #{image}, price = #{price}, description = #{description}, stock = #{stock}, status = #{status}, discount = #{discount} WHERE id = #{id}
